items.name_en: M46595 M46596 Full Leather Messenger Bag Collection Small East West Métis Handbag The small East West Métis handbag features a trendy shoulder-bag silhouette. The compact body is made of soft Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring a distinctive S-lock and a stylish top handle, with a polished, shiny surface. Versatile and spacious. A detachable long shoulder strap makes it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody, a great companion for daily travel. Dimensions 21.5x6x13cm

items.name_en: M46653 This OnTheGo tote bag combines Giant Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, reinterpreting the spacious East West silhouette. A removable circular coin purse adds detail, while the Toron top handle and removable wide shoulder strap offer versatile carrying options.

items.name_en: M46961 Red - Creative Director Pharrell Williams reinterprets the Speedy Bandoulière 50 Monogram Leather bag with eye-catching, luxurious, and soft natural calfskin. He uses exquisite screen printing to embellish the Speedy with the Monogram pattern, recreating the twill texture of the Monogram canvas on the bag, creating a near-hand-painted blurred effect. 50 x 32 x 29 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M48865 Cream White with Blue Enamel / Medium M23950 This Capucines Medium bag is dyed in soft, gentle tones, making the classic silhouette even more eye-catching. Exquisite chains string together metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shimmer with brilliant light. The flap can be placed on the outside or tucked inside to reveal the LV logo. size:31.5x20x11cm
